meta.notes: Dutch household electricity — NATIONAL AVERAGE from CBS (Statistics Netherlands), StatLine 85592NED, incl. VAT. All-in variable 0.2165 €/kWh = energy contract 0.0661 + renewable surcharge (ODE) 0.0363 + energy tax 0.1141. Annual fixed: transport €257 + supply €67, offset by the energy-tax rebate €-559/yr (heffingskorting). Standard (non-dynamic) contract. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute CBS. A national average, not a shoppable plan. Period 2021MM01.
